scenarios.title: Molecular ML, Drug Discovery, and Chemistry Workflows
scenarios.when_to_read: Tasks involving DiffDock, diffusion-based molecular docking, protein-ligand pose prediction, docking benchmark evaluation, chemistry model training, or DiffDock Gradio UI usage.
scenarios.role: Provides repo-specific routing, command construction, validation, troubleshooting, and benchmark/training guidance for DiffDock workflows.
scenarios.read_when: User mentions DiffDock, DiffDock-L, docking inference, protein_ligand_csv, default_inference_args.yaml, PDBBind, BindingMOAD, DockGen, PoseBusters, GNINA, spyrmsd, DiffDock Web, score model training, or confidence model training.
scenarios.best_for: Planning and debugging DiffDock inference, UI, training/data preparation, evaluation benchmarks, RMSD/confidence metrics, and safe preflight checks without re-reading the source repository.
scenarios.avoid_when: The task is about a different docking package, generic RDKit chemistry unrelated to DiffDock, protein-protein docking, or installing arbitrary CUDA/Torch stacks without DiffDock-specific context.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose `diffdock` when DiffDock's script-style commands, data layouts, model checkpoints, or benchmark conventions matter; use broader molecular ML skills only when the task is not DiffDock-specific.
